agent.name: Griffain
agent.description: Personal AI agent that executes on-chain operations via natural language. Swaps, bridges, yield farms on Solana.

keyFindings: Bridge selection is reasonable (Wormhole is a major bridge).
The yield data was approximately correct at time of testing (within 1-2% of actual rates).
Portfolio values were accurate against on-chain data.

trustExplanation: Mixed results: 2 skills passed, 3 need improvement.

recommendation.summary: Use with caution: safety concerns were identified during audit.

disclaimer: This Critical Report is a summary of the most recent Dantian certification audit. It is not a new evaluation. Agent capabilities may have changed since the last audit.
